Pancreas Transplantation 
URL of this page: https://medlineplus.gov/pancreastransplantation.html 
Pancreas Transplantation
Summary 
The pancreas is a gland behind your stomach and in front of your spine. It produces the juices that help break down food and the hormones that help control blood sugar levels. A pancreas transplant is surgery to place a healthy pancreas from a donor into a person with a diseased pancreas. It is mostly done for people with severe type 1 diabetes . It can allow them to give up insulin shots. An experimental procedure called islet cell tran
